description: Tab completion returning [not_found] on every request — codebase indexing stuck on loading
notes: Every request logs 'Error in streaming cpp (connect error) [not_found]'. Tab completely broken. Indexing never completes.

description: Code suggestions stopped appearing after clearing settings.json — worked once then broke again
notes: Chat works fine but Tab suggestions gone. Clearing settings only fixes temporarily. Intermittent — hard to reproduce reliably.

description: Tab completion has gotten worse — hallucinating suggestions aggressively with no context
notes: Overly aggressive suggestions when no context available. Previously fast and accurate for refactoring — now unreliable for new code.

description: Tab complete shows suggestion but pressing Tab does nothing — or deletes 5-20 unrelated lines
notes: Must type something first to accept suggestion. When it does accept — deletes unrelated code below cursor position. Data loss risk.

description: Agent/editor mode switch button broken — no way to switch back to editor mode without CMD+E
notes: Button changes label but doesn't switch modes. Workaround exists (CMD+E) but UX is broken and confusing.

description: Agent deletes files on repeated edits — not intentional deletion but a write bug
notes: Since update 2.1.50 repeated edits to same file result in file deletion. Confirmed not agent logic — bug in Cursor's file write mechanism.

description: Cursor reliably crashes every time Agent mode edits a file — Agent mode entirely unusable
column8: all extensions disabled. UI freezes the moment Agent goes to edit any file. 100% repro rate.

description: Agent/editor view selection applies to ALL open Cursor windows — not per-window
notes: Switching to agent view in one window forces all other open Cursor windows to switch too. Breaks multi-project workflows.

description: Agent edits files without accessing them in user mode — bypasses confirmation requirement
notes: Agent auto-creates/edits files using markdown code block syntax without user confirmation. Security and consent concern.

description: Agent mode applies file changes directly to disk with no diff UI or Accept/Reject controls after update
notes: After recent update — no red/green inline diff shown. No Keep/Undo buttons. Changes auto-accepted with no review step. Multiple versions affected.
